title: Automations Started Failing
excerpt: All of a sudden I have several different boards that the automations have stopped working correctly. It seems to be when I created the automations and it has my email but we change that to the owner of the boards email, …

posts.author: SandyT (Sandra Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
All of a sudden I have several different boards that the automations have stopped working correctly. It seems to be when I created the automations and it has my email but we change that to the owner of the boards email, the automations stopped working correctly. Some work but the persons who email is the person who stops receiving them. ’
Any help would be much appreciated.

Thanks
Sandra Thompson

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sandra! This sounds like something our automations experts would be best equipped to handle. If you’re still experiencing these issues, click here to get in touch with our team.

Thanks! We look forward to hearing from you!
